message:
bd-3jff: Add JSON deep-dive scene with API payload demos

Implements the JSON scene for demo_showcase featuring:
- API request payload with deployment config (POST /api/v1/deployments)
- API response payload with deployment status (200 OK)
- Custom theme demonstration showing semantic coloring
- Feature-gate notice when json feature is disabled

Updates tests and snapshots for the renamed scene (deep_dive_json -> json).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
